name: bearly
description: Bearly — Claude Code tools for coordination, testing, research, and refactoring

plugins.name: tribe
plugins.description: Cross-session coordination — discover, message, and coordinate work across multiple Claude Code sessions

plugins.name: llm
plugins.description: Multi-LLM research — deep research, second opinions, and multi-model debate via GPT, Gemini, Grok, and Perplexity

plugins.name: recall
plugins.description: Session history search — FTS5-indexed search across past Claude Code sessions with LLM synthesis and file recovery

plugins.name: batch-refactor
plugins.description: Batch rename, refactor, and migrate across files — TypeScript symbols, file renames, text/markdown updates, API migrations

plugins.name: github
plugins.description: GitHub notifications — build failures, PR activity, push events delivered as channel messages
